summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TradeLife wordmark redesign iteration 4. All visual and interactive elements tested successfully with 100% pass rate.
passed_tests: Login page loads at /login without errors
TradeLife wordmark displays with upright Playfair Display serif font (not italic)
TradeLife wordmark has visible light-based depth gradient styling (not flat white)
Blue energy arc is clearly visible with 3 layers (arc, bloom, halo) using screen blend mode
Tagline 'Built for trades' is visible with 2 decorative divider lines
Email input works correctly with proper focus states
Password input works correctly with proper focus states
Password visibility toggle works (password ↔ text type switching)
Sign in button is present, clickable, and styled with blue gradient
Google button is present, clickable, with proper Google branding
No console errors on the page
Glass panel renders correctly with backdrop blur and 3D perspective
All visual elements are properly visible and interactive
